name: Charlie Kirk
title: Political Activist, Author & Founder of Turning Point USA
bio: American conservative political activist, author, and media personality who founded Turning Point USA in 2012 at age 18. The organization grew into one of the largest conservative youth organizations in America. He hosted 'The Charlie Kirk Show' and was a prominent figure in the conservative movement. He was assassinated on September 10, 2025, and posthumously awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom.
faith: Kirk was an outspoken Christian who frequently spoke about biblical values, the importance of faith in public life, and the intersection of Christianity and politics. He hosted faith-based events through Turning Point and advocated for religious liberty. He spoke at churches and Christian conferences about defending the faith in the public square.
